titleStmt.title: SII 38.548: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 548. (A.R. No. 548 of 1912.) TIRUNĪRMALAI, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPET DISTRICT. On the south wall, Nīrvaṇṇa-perumāḷ shrine, Raṅganātha perumāḷ temple.

p.hi: King: Kulōttuṅga III Year 10; Makra, śu. di. 5 Tiruvōṇam, Monday, 1188 A.D.

summary.p: This record is faintly engraved, hence certain letters could not be made out satisfactorily. It registers a gift of a coin Gaṇḍagōpālan-pudumāḍai by Tillai-nāyagaṉ, a resident of Nelmali in Paḍuvūr-nāḍu in Āmūr-kōṭṭam for burning a twilight lamp to the god Nīrvaṇṇaṉ of the temple at Tirunīrmalai in Śurattu-nāḍu in Puliryūrkōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam. The priest of the temple, Nārāyaṇa Bhaṭṭaṉ, son of Śrī Kṛishṇa Bhaṭṭaṉ received the gift and agreed to burn the lamp perpetually.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ virarājentira coḻatevaṟkku yāṇṭu [10] Āvatu makaraṉāyaṟṟu pūrvva pakṣattu pañcamiyum
tiṅkaḷkkiḻamaiyum tiruvoṇamum peṟṟaṉāḷ jeyaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu puliyūṟkoṭṭattu curattunāṭṭu tirunirmalai nāyanār nirvaṇṇanukku Āmuṟko
ṭṭattu paṭuvūrnāṭṭu nelmaliil nelmalikiḻāṉ tillai nāyakaneṉ vaitta caṉti viḷakku Onṟum Ikkoil nampimāril ṉaimicai śrīkraṣṇabhaṭṭasomayā
[jiyār] piḷḷai ṉārāyaṇapaṭṭaneṉ Ittiru viḷak m Ivan pakkal nāṉ kaikkoṇṭa kaṇṭakopālaṉputumāṭai 1 Immāṭai Oṉṟum kaikkoṇṭu cantirā
titaivarai celuttak kaṭaven śrīkraṣṇabhaṭṭa se yār makan nārāyaṇabhaṭṭanen .
Digital edition of SII 38.548 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
